Next lesson nav grayed out until completed

human_actions_pending.action: Regenerate L1–L4 question banks to fix answer length bias (correct answer is almost always the longest option — 19/20 by selecting longest every time)

decisions.decision: Quiz renamed to Test throughout UI; URLs kept as /quiz/
decisions.rationale: URLs are breaking changes; display text only

decisions.decision: Tab resume clears answers, keeps locked questions
decisions.rationale: User confirmed this is desired behaviour

decisions.decision: force-dynamic on lessons layout instead of router.refresh() alone
decisions.rationale: router.refresh() + router.push() had race condition causing stale sidebar
Proportional to lesson length, capped at 60s per user request

decisions.decision: Bottom nav: Previous only (subtle), Next removed
decisions.rationale: Complete button handles forward navigation with next lesson name inline

next_action: User to regenerate question banks (fix answer length bias using node scripts/import-quiz-questions.js for levels 1-4), then run new migrations in Supabase, then plan v3.0 milestone (Stripe + legal pages)
context_notes: All UAT scenarios A-I complete. Platform functional end-to-end through Level 3. Level 4 has 2/6 quiz topics. Levels 5-11 have no quiz content. All changes committed and pushed to master.
